highlights.text: Serial code AP-006 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-AP-VIZ-006
State / Country: Andhra Pradesh / India | Category: Premium Family Tour
The Coastal & Hills Symphony: Visakhapatnam • Araku Valley
TOUR OVERVIEW: Discover the perfect blend of coastal charm and hill station tranquility with curated experiences from Vistadome train journeys to beachfront relaxation.
WHY VISIT: Visakhapatnam offers urban beaches and naval history; Araku Valley provides coffee plantations and limestone wonders.

itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Vizag-Araku Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: The Coastal & Hills Symphony: Visakhapatnam • Araku Valley • 05 Nights / 06 Days
itinerary.overview:
Discover the perfect blend of coastal charm and hill station tranquility with this Best Andhra Pradesh Tour Package. Curated by TRAGUIN, this 5-night family odyssey ensures unforgettable memories, offering curated experiences that range from Vistadome train journeys to beachfront relaxation.

WHY VISIT VISAKHAPATNAM & ARAKU VALLEY?
As one of the most sought-after Top Tourist Places in Andhra Pradesh, Visakhapatnam offers a unique mix of urban beaches and naval history, while Araku Valley provides breathtaking landscapes of coffee plantations and limestone wonders. This is the Best Time to Visit Araku Valley for families seeking a Premium Araku Valley Experience.
itinerary.seo_title: AP-006 | Premium Vizag-Araku Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Vizag-Araku family package (AP-006 / TG-AP-VIZ-006): RK Beach, Vistadome train, Borra Caves, Chaprai Waterfalls, and TRAGUIN curated experiences.

highlights.text: RK Beach and Submarine Museum on arrival evening in Vizag
Rushikonda Beach, Thotlakonda, and Kailasagiri Hill scenic beauty
Iconic Vistadome train with breathtaking Eastern Ghats landscapes
Borra Caves, coffee estates, Chaprai Waterfalls, and local tribal culture
TRAGUIN curated Vistadome train experience and smooth departure support

days.title: ARRIVAL IN VIZAG
days.description: Arrive in Visakhapatnam. Transfer to a handpicked hotel by TRAGUIN. Evening visit to RK Beach and the Submarine Museum.
activities: Sightseeing Included: RK Beach, Submarine Museum.

days.title: VIZAG COASTAL BEAUTY
days.description: Visit Rushikonda Beach, Thotlakonda, and the Kailasagiri Hill for scenic beauty.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Rushikonda Beach, Thotlakonda, Kailasagiri Hill.

days.title: VISTADOME TRAIN TO ARAKU
days.description: Board the iconic Vistadome train. Enjoy breathtaking landscapes. Check into an Araku Valley luxury hotel.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Vistadome train journey, scenic ghat landscapes.

days.title: ARAKU VALLEY EXPLORATION
days.description: Visit Borra Caves, coffee estates, and Chaprai Waterfalls. Enjoy immersive experiences with local tribal culture.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Borra Caves, coffee estates, Chaprai Waterfalls, local tribal culture.

days.title: RETURN TO VIZAG
days.description: Drive back to Vizag via scenic mountain roads. Enjoy an exclusive experience at a beachside cafe.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic mountain road drive, beachside cafe experience.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before departure. TRAGUIN support ensures a smooth exit.
